name: Chevre Torta
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons prepared pesto sauce, well drained
1/2 cup roasted red peppers, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 1-quart bowl or loaf pan with plastic wrap.
2. Place the cream cheese, goat cheese, and garlic in a food processor or mixer. Process until well blended. Add oil and thyme, then blend well.
3. Spoon one-third of the cheese mixture into the lined bowl. Spread pesto over the cheese. Add half of the remaining cheese mixture. Spread with chopped red peppers, and top with the remaining cheese mixture.
4. Cover and refrigerate for several hours or overnight. To unmold, place the bowl upside down on a serving platter. Lift up the bowl and peel off the plastic wrap.
5. Serve with crackers or a sliced baguette.
